def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    oversold = params['oversold']
    overbought = params['overbought']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    signals = pd.Series(np.where(df['rsi'] < oversold, 1, np.where(df['rsi'] > overbought, -1, 0)), index=df.index)
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: USD/JPY exhibits mean reversion behavior when RSI indicates overbought or oversold conditions.
